care.summary: Hardy upright succulent that thrives on neglect; ideal for low light and infrequent watering.
care.light: Low to bright indirect; tolerates fluorescent office light
care.water: Every 2–4 weeks; let soil dry fully between waterings
care.fertilizer: Light feed 2–3× per year in warm months
common_issues: Mushy leaves in cold wet soil
Brown tips from fluoride or dry air
tips: Use a pot with drainage holes
Wipe leaves to keep stomata clear
Propagate leaf cuttings in water or soil
